title: Craftable Name Tags
description: Makes name tags craftable from a crafting table.
body:
# Craftable Name Tags
## What it does
Craftable Name Tags is a very simple datapack with only 1 goal, to make name tags craftable.

Crafting a name tag is very easy and only takes 2 paper and 1 string.

<details>
<summary>Crafting Recipe</summary>

![Crafting recipe for the name tag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b29af6b250ac90dd67e29f8d8a79122a436d95b.png)

</details>

This can be installed and uninstalled freely in your world without any issues.
